HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Searching...
No Matches

16#ifndef LAYERED_MEDIA_UTILS_H
17#define LAYERED_MEDIA_UTILS_H

19#include <map>
20#include <stdexcept> // For exception handling
21#include <functional> // For std::function
22#include <vector>
23#include "globals.h"
24#include <fstream>

26// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
27// Layered media utility structures
28// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
33struct PositionGroup {
34 size_t i1;
35 size_t i2;
36 std::vector<rvec> pos1;
37 std::vector<rvec> pos2;
38 std::vector<size_t> ind1;
39 std::vector<size_t> ind2;
40};
41
46struct Range {
47 int i1;
48 int i2;
49 std::vector<double> r;
50 std::vector<double> z1;
51 std::vector<double> z2;
52};
53
58struct Grid {
59 int i1;
60 int i2;
61 std::vector<double> r;
62 std::vector<double> z1;
63 std::vector<double> z2;
64};
65
70struct layeredCoords {
71 double r{0.0};
72 double Z1{0.0};
73 double Z2{0.0};
74 double R1{0.0};
75 double R2{0.0};
76};
77
82struct Data2D {
83 std::vector<double> rVec;
84 std::vector<std::vector<double>> rMatrix;
85 std::vector<double> z1Vec;
86 std::vector<std::vector<double>> z1Matrix;
87 std::vector<double> z2Vec;
88 std::vector<std::vector<double>> z2Matrix;
89 std::vector<int> indVec;
90 std::vector<std::complex<int>> indVecComplex;
91};
92
97struct Data3D {
98 std::vector<double> rVec;
99 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> rMatrix;
100 std::vector<double> z1Vec;
101 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z1Matrix;
102 std::vector<double> z2Vec;
103 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z2Matrix;
104 std::vector<int> indVec;
105 std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, int>> indVecTriplet;
106};
107
112struct CoeffsIntra {
113 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
114 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
115 std::vector<double>> te;
116 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
117 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
118 std::vector<double>> tm;
119 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
120 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
121 std::vector<double>> tez;
122 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
123 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
124 std::vector<double>> tmz;
125 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
126 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
127 std::vector<double>> tezz;
128 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
129 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
130 std::vector<double>> tmzz;
131 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
132 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
133 std::vector<double>> tes;
134 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
135 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
136 std::vector<double>> tms;
137 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
138 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
139 std::vector<double>> ter;
140 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
141 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
142 std::vector<double>> tmr;
143 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
144 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
145 std::vector<double>> terz;
146 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>,
147 std::vector<int>, std::vector<double>,
148 std::vector<double>> tmrz;
149};
150
155struct CoeffsInter {
156 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
157 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> te;
158 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
159 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tm;
160 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
161 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tez1;
162 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
163 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmz1;
164 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
165 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tez2;
166 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
167 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmz2;
168 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
169 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tezz;
170 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
171 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmzz;
172 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
173 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tes;
174 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
175 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tms;
176 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
177 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> ter;
178 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
179 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmr;
180 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
181 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> terz1;
182 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
183 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmrz1;
184 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
185 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> terz2;
186 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
187 std::vector<double>, std::vector<dcmplx>> tmrz2;
188
189 std::vector<double> scales;
190};
191
196struct IntegrandIntra {
197 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> te;
198 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tm;
199 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tez;
200 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tmz;
201 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tezz;
202 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tmzz;
203 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tes;
204 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tms;
205 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> ter;
206 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tmr;
207 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> terz;
208 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> tmrz;
209
215 IntegrandIntra operator-(const IntegrandIntra& other) const {
216 IntegrandIntra result = *this;
217 subtractVector(result.te, other.te );
218 subtractVector(result.tm, other.tm );
219 subtractVector(result.tez, other.tez );
220 subtractVector(result.tmz, other.tmz );
221 subtractVector(result.tezz, other.tezz);
222 subtractVector(result.tmzz, other.tmzz);
223 subtractVector(result.tes, other.tes );
224 subtractVector(result.tms, other.tms );
225 subtractVector(result.ter, other.ter );
226 subtractVector(result.tmr, other.tmr );
227 subtractVector(result.terz, other.terz);
228 subtractVector(result.tmrz, other.tmrz);
229 return result;
230 }
231
238 friend IntegrandIntra operator*(const dcmplx& scalar, const IntegrandIntra& obj) {
239 IntegrandIntra result = obj;
240 multiplyVector(result.te, scalar);
241 multiplyVector(result.tm, scalar);
242 multiplyVector(result.tez, scalar);
243 multiplyVector(result.tmz, scalar);
244 multiplyVector(result.tezz, scalar);
245 multiplyVector(result.tmzz, scalar);
246 multiplyVector(result.tes, scalar);
247 multiplyVector(result.tms, scalar);
248 multiplyVector(result.ter, scalar);
249 multiplyVector(result.tmr, scalar);
250 multiplyVector(result.terz, scalar);
251 multiplyVector(result.tmrz, scalar);
252 return result;
253 }
254
260 IntegrandIntra flatten(const std::vector<std::complex<int>>& indVecComplex) const {
261 IntegrandIntra result;
262
263 // Process each member
264 result.te = flattenVector(te, indVecComplex);
265 result.tm = flattenVector(tm, indVecComplex);
266 result.tez = flattenVector(tez, indVecComplex);
267 result.tmz = flattenVector(tmz, indVecComplex);
268 result.tezz = flattenVector(tezz, indVecComplex);
269 result.tmzz = flattenVector(tmzz, indVecComplex);
270 result.tes = flattenVector(tes, indVecComplex);
271 result.tms = flattenVector(tms, indVecComplex);
272 result.ter = flattenVector(ter, indVecComplex);
273 result.tmr = flattenVector(tmr, indVecComplex);
274 result.terz = flattenVector(terz, indVecComplex);
275 result.tmrz = flattenVector(tmrz, indVecComplex);
276
277 return result;
278}
279
280 private:
286 static void subtractVector(std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& a,
287 const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& b) {
288 if (a.size() != b.size()) return; // Ensure sizes match
289 for (size_t i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i) {
290 if (a[i].size() != b[i].size()) continue;
291 for (size_t j = 0; j < a[i].size(); ++j) {
292 a[i][j] -= b[i][j];
293 }
294 }
295 }
296
302 static void multiplyVector(std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& vec, const dcmplx& scalar) {
303 for (size_t i = 0; i < vec.size(); ++i) {
304 for (size_t j = 0; j < vec[i].size(); ++j) {
305 vec[i][j] *= scalar;
306 }
307 }
308 }
309
315 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> flattenVector(
316 const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& matrix,
317 const std::vector<std::complex<int>>& indVecComplex) const {
318 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> flattened;
319 for (const auto& coord : indVecComplex) {
320 int i = coord.real(); // Extract row index
321 int j = coord.imag(); // Extract column index
322 flattened.push_back({ getValue(matrix, i, j) }); // Store as 1-column 2D vector
323 }
324 return flattened;
325 }
326
333 dcmplx getValue(const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& matrix, int i, int j) const {
334 if (i >= 0 && i < static_cast<int>(matrix.size()) &&
335 j >= 0 && j < static_cast<int>(matrix[i].size())) {
336 return matrix[i][j];
337 }
338 return dcmplx(0, 0); // Default to zero if out of bounds
339 }
340};
341
346struct IntegrandInter {
347 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> te;
348 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tm;
349 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tez1;
350 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmz1;
351 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tez2;
352 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmz2;
353 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tezz;
354 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmzz;
355 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tes;
356 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tms;
357 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> ter;
358 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmr;
359 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> terz1;
360 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmrz1;
361 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> terz2;
362 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> tmrz2;
363
369 IntegrandInter operator-(const IntegrandInter& other) const {
370 IntegrandInter result = *this;
371 subtractVector(result.te, other.te );
372 subtractVector(result.tm, other.tm );
373 subtractVector(result.tez1, other.tez1 );
374 subtractVector(result.tmz1, other.tmz1 );
375 subtractVector(result.tez2, other.tez2 );
376 subtractVector(result.tmz2, other.tmz2 );
377 subtractVector(result.tezz, other.tezz );
378 subtractVector(result.tmzz, other.tmzz );
379 subtractVector(result.tes, other.tes );
380 subtractVector(result.tms, other.tms );
381 subtractVector(result.ter, other.ter );
382 subtractVector(result.tmr, other.tmr );
383 subtractVector(result.terz1, other.terz1);
384 subtractVector(result.tmrz1, other.tmrz1);
385 subtractVector(result.terz2, other.terz2);
386 subtractVector(result.tmrz2, other.tmrz2);
387 return result;
388 }
389
396 friend IntegrandInter operator*(const dcmplx& scalar, const IntegrandInter& obj) {
397 IntegrandInter result = obj;
398 multiplyVector(result.te, scalar);
399 multiplyVector(result.tm, scalar);
400 multiplyVector(result.tez1, scalar);
401 multiplyVector(result.tmz1, scalar);
402 multiplyVector(result.tez2, scalar);
403 multiplyVector(result.tmz2, scalar);
404 multiplyVector(result.tezz, scalar);
405 multiplyVector(result.tmzz, scalar);
406 multiplyVector(result.tes, scalar);
407 multiplyVector(result.tms, scalar);
408 multiplyVector(result.ter, scalar);
409 multiplyVector(result.tmr, scalar);
410 multiplyVector(result.terz1, scalar);
411 multiplyVector(result.tmrz1, scalar);
412 multiplyVector(result.terz2, scalar);
413 multiplyVector(result.tmrz2, scalar);
414 return result;
415 }
416
422 IntegrandInter flatten(const std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, int>>& indVecTriplet) const {
423 IntegrandInter result;
424
425 // Process each member
426 result.te = flattenVector(te, indVecTriplet);
427 result.tm = flattenVector(tm, indVecTriplet);
428 result.tez1 = flattenVector(tez1, indVecTriplet);
429 result.tmz1 = flattenVector(tmz1, indVecTriplet);
430 result.tez2 = flattenVector(tez2, indVecTriplet);
431 result.tmz2 = flattenVector(tmz2, indVecTriplet);
432 result.tezz = flattenVector(tezz, indVecTriplet);
433 result.tmzz = flattenVector(tmzz, indVecTriplet);
434 result.tes = flattenVector(tes, indVecTriplet);
435 result.tms = flattenVector(tms, indVecTriplet);
436 result.ter = flattenVector(ter, indVecTriplet);
437 result.tmr = flattenVector(tmr, indVecTriplet);
438 result.terz1 = flattenVector(terz1, indVecTriplet);
439 result.tmrz1 = flattenVector(tmrz1, indVecTriplet);
440 result.terz2 = flattenVector(terz2, indVecTriplet);
441 result.tmrz2 = flattenVector(tmrz2, indVecTriplet);
442
443 return result;
444 }
445
446 private:
456 static void subtractVector(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& a,
457 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& b) {
458 if (a.size() != b.size()) return; // Ensure sizes match
459 for (size_t i = 0; i < a.size(); ++i) {
460 if (a[i].size() != b[i].size()) continue;
461 for (size_t j = 0; j < a[i].size(); ++j) {
462 if (a[i][j].size() != b[i][j].size()) continue;
463 for (size_t k = 0; k < a[i][j].size(); ++k) {
464 a[i][j][k] -= b[i][j][k];
465 }
466 }
467 }
468 }
469
477 static void multiplyVector(std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& vec,
478 const dcmplx& scalar) {
479 for (size_t i = 0; i < vec.size(); ++i) {
480 for (size_t j = 0; j < vec[i].size(); ++j) {
481 for (size_t k = 0; k < vec[i][j].size(); ++k) {
482 vec[i][j][k] *= scalar;
483 }
484 }
485 }
486 }
487
498 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> flattenVector(
499 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& matrix,
500 const std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, int>>& indVecTriplet) const {
501 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> flattened;
502 for (const auto& coord : indVecTriplet) {
503 int i = std::get<0>(coord); // Extract first index
504 int j = std::get<1>(coord); // Extract second index
505 int k = std::get<2>(coord); // Extract third index
506 flattened.push_back({ {getValue(matrix, i, j, k)} }); // Store as 1-column 3D vector
507 }
508 return flattened;
509 }
510
520 dcmplx getValue(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& matrix, int i, int j, int k) const {
521 if (i >= 0 && i < static_cast<int>(matrix.size()) &&
522 j >= 0 && j < static_cast<int>(matrix[i].size()) &&
523 k >= 0 && k < static_cast<int>(matrix[i][j].size())) {
524 return matrix[i][j][k];
525 }
526 return dcmplx(0, 0); // Default to zero if out of bounds
527 }
528};
529
531
535class LayeredMediaUtils {
536 private:
537 std::vector<dcmplx> k_L;
538 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilon;
539 std::vector<dcmplx> mu;
540 std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces;
541 std::vector<double> thickness;
542 int midLayerIndex;
543
544 public:
554 LayeredMediaUtils(const std::vector<dcmplx>& inLayeredK,
555 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
556 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
557 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
558 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
559 int inMidLayerIndex = 0);
560
562 ~LayeredMediaUtils() = default;
563
569 int GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const;
570
579 std::vector<dcmplx> FresnelCoeff(int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ,
580 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
581
590 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> InterfaceTransferMatrix(
591 int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ,
592 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
593
601 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> propagationMatrix(int layerIndex, dcmplx krho) const;
602
610 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> totalTransferMatrix(dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
611
620 std::vector<dcmplx> totalFresnelCoeffs(dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves,
621 const std::string& direction) const;
622
631 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> Secondary(dcmplx krho, int observationLayer,
632 int sourceLayer, const std::string& waves);
633
642 std::vector<dcmplx> Fields(dcmplx krho, std::vector<double> observationPointsZ,
643 double sourcePointZ, const std::string& waves);
644
652 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> matrixMultiply2D(const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& x,
653 const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& y) const;
654
661 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>> matrixMultiply3D(
662 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& x,
663 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& y) const;
664
670 void matrixMultiplication(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& x,
671 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& y) const;
672
682 layeredCoords cartesianToLayeredQS(const rvec &r1, const rvec &r2,
683 const std::string& type) const;
684
694 layeredCoords cartesianToLayeredTab(const rvec &r1, const rvec &r2,
695 const std::string& type) const;
696
702 template <typename T> int sgn(T val) {
703 return (T(0) < val) - (val < T(0));
704 }
705
711 dcmplx getkL(int index) {
712 return k_L[index];
713 }
714
720 double getZValInterface(int index) {
721 if (index < 0 || index >= zValsInterfaces.size()) {
722 throw std::out_of_range("Index out of range in getZValInterface");
723 }
724 return zValsInterfaces[index];
725 }
726
732 dcmplx getEps(int index) {
733 if (index < 0 || index >= epsilon.size()) {
734 throw std::out_of_range("Index out of range in getEpsilon");
735 }
736 return epsilon[index];
737 }
738
744 dcmplx getMu(int index) {
745 if (index < 0 || index >= mu.size()) {
746 throw std::out_of_range("Index out of range in getMu");
747 }
748 return mu[index];
749 }
750
761 std::vector<rvec> readPositionsFromFile(const std::string& filename) {
762 std::vector<rvec> positions;
763 std::ifstream file(filename);
764
765 if (!file.is_open()) {
766 throw std::runtime_error("Could not open file: " + filename);
767 }
768
769 std::string line;
770 while (std::getline(file, line)) {
771 std::istringstream iss(line);
772 double x, y, z;
773 if (iss >> x >> y >> z) {
774 positions.emplace_back(x, y, z);
775 }
776 }
777
778 file.close();
779 return positions;
780 }
781};
782
783#endif

Computes the interface transfer matrix for TE or TM waves.
